시편 8:1.content: Yahweh, our Lord, how majestic is your name in all the earth! You have set your glory above the heavens!

시편 8:2.content: From the lips of babes and infants you have established strength, because of your adversaries, that you might silence the enemy and the avenger.

시편 8:3.content: When I consider your heavens, the work of your fingers, the moon and the stars, which you have ordained;

시편 8:4.content: what is man, that you think of him? What is the son of man, that you care for him?

시편 8:5.content: For you have made him a little lower than the angels, and crowned him with glory and honor.

시편 8:6.content: You make him ruler over the works of your hands. You have put all things under his feet:

시편 8:7.content: All sheep and cattle, yes, and the animals of the field,

시편 8:8.content: the birds of the sky, the fish of the sea, and whatever passes through the paths of the seas.

시편 8:9.content: Yahweh, our Lord, how majestic is your name in all the earth!
